patch.value: CONTEXT: a manually maintained CHANGELOG drifted repeatedly and could silently break the release trigger. DECISION: CHANGELOG.md is always regenerated by pnpm changelog:pm (changelog generate --status closed --all-release-tags --mode replace) from closed tracker items windowed by git release-tag timestamps; the changelog:pm:check gate enforces it in CI Gates(static); regen is the LAST step before committing closures (even a comment reorders Unreleased). CONSEQUENCES: single source of truth; classifier (classifyItem) is a hidden contract contributors must understand (see pm-5vsv); cross-repo dependency on pm-changelog. EVIDENCE: package.json changelog:pm; pm-changelog/src/generator.ts; memory feedback_changelog_regen_last_step, changelog_buckets_by_updated_at.
ADR: CHANGELOG is auto-generated from closed items by pm-changelog; never hand-edited
CHANGELOG is auto-generated from closed items by pm-changelog; never hand-edited
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.
The closed Decision 'ADR: CHANGELOG is auto-generated from closed items by pm-changelog; never hand-edited' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
